series_metadata.series_description: The discretionary grant case file includes the original application, required forms, grant award notifications, annual grant performance reports, correspondence, decisions or any document that has been identified as part of the official grant file

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain for 15 years after final action is taken on file. ; Paper: Retain for 15 years after final action is taken on file., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
